app_service_plan_id.description: ID of the App Service Plan to associate with the certificate; must be in the same region as the certificate.

key_vault_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Key Vault containing the certificate. Must be in the same Azure region as the App Service Certificate.

key_vault_secret_id.description: ID of the Key Vault Secret containing the private certificate. Must be in the format of a full resource ID.

name.description: Specifies the name of the App Service Certificate. Must be unique within the resource group.

password.description: Password used to access the PFX file for the App Service Certificate; must match the password set during the certificate export.

pfx_blob.description: PFX certificate file data in base64 format, used for importing the SSL/TLS certificate. Must be a valid PFX file.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize resources, supporting resource management and billing; values must be strings.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeouts for create, update, and delete operations of the App Service Certificate.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
